headline: Expand Energy (EXE) Price Target Trimmed by $6 Amid Q1 Preview
summary: Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) is included among the 12 Most Undervalued Natural Gas Stocks to Buy Now. Formed in 2024 by the merger of Chesapeake Energy Corporation and Southwestern Energy Company, Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:EXE) operates as an independent natural gas production company in the United States. On April 13, UBS lowered its price target […]
